zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan於1498年出生在英國英格蘭賀特福爾斯坦登時，她的父親Sir Roger Crawford28歲，母親Elizabeth Hay23歲。她於1519年與Sir Nicholas Kirby在英國結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1565年1月19日在英國英格蘭賀特福爾圖德利其享年67歲，埋葬在英國賀特福爾圖德利其。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan于1498年出生在英国英格兰賀特福爾斯坦登时，她的父亲Sir Roger Crawford28岁，母亲Elizabeth Hay23岁。她于1519年与Sir Nicholas Kirby在英国结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1565年1月19日在英国英格兰賀特福爾圖德利其享年67岁，埋葬在英国賀特福爾圖德利其。

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan was born in 1498, in Standon, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Roger Crawford, was 28 and her mother, Elizabeth Hay, was 23. She married Sir Nicholas Kirby in 1519, in England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 6 daughters. She died on 19 January 1565, in Thundridge, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 67, and was buried in Thundridge, Hertfordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan est née en 1498, à Standon, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Roger Crawford, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Hay, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Nicholas Kirby en 1519, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée le 19 janvier 1565, à Thundridge, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 67 ans, et a été enterrée à Thundridge, Hertfordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan 1498 in Standon, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Roger Crawford 28 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Hay 23. Sie hat 1519 in England Sir Nicholas Kirby geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb am 19. Januar 1565 im Alter von 67 Jahren in Thundridge, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Thundridge, Hertfordshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan è nata il nel 1498 nel Standon, Hertfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir Roger Crawford, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Hay, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato Sir Nicholas Kirby nel 1519, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 6 figlie. Morì il 19 gennaio 1565, nel Thundridge, Hertfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 67 anni, e fu sepolta a Thundridge, Hertfordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Joanが1498年にイギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアスタンドンで生まれた時，父Sir Roger Crawfordは28歳，母Elizabeth Hayは23歳であった。1519年にイギリスでSir Nicholas Kirbyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1565年1月19日にイギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアスウンドリッジで67歳で死去し，イギリスハートフォードシュアイアスウンドリッジにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan(이)가 1498년 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 스탠던에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Roger Crawford(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Hay(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1519년 영국에서 Sir Nicholas Kirby(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1565년 1월 19일 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 툰드리지에서 67세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 허트퍼드실르 툰드리지에 묻혔다.

Ela faleceu em 19 de janeiro de 1565, em Thundridge, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 67 anos, e foi sepultada em Thundridge, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan родилась в 1498 г. в местности стандон, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Roger Crawford было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Hay, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Nicholas Kirby в 1519 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Она умерла 19 января 1565 г. в местности тундридж, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 67 лет и была похоронена в местности тундридж, хиртфордшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan nació en 1498, en Standon, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Roger Crawford, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Hay, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Sir Nicholas Kirby en 1519, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió el 19 de enero de 1565, en Thundridge, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 67 años, y fue sepultada en Thundridge, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra.
